player_notes.luka doncic: Suspended for Monday's game vs. Washington after 16th technical foul upheld. Avoid all LAL player props for that game; expect major role/minutes shifts for teammates.
player_notes.jarrett allen: Returned from injury, scored 18 pts in just 18 minutes vs. Heat. Monitor minutes restriction — may still be on a limit.

game_notes.LAL vs WAS: Luka Doncic suspended; significant minutes and usage boost expected for LAL supporting cast (Austin Reaves, etc.) against Washington.
